sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, value STRING);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (1, rpad('abc', 6, 'DB'));
UPDATE test_strings SET value = rpad(value, 10, '#') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT rpad(value, 8, '-') AS padded_value FROM test_strings;
DELETE FROM test_strings WHERE value = rpad('xyz', 5, '123');
